name: Angel Investor — Allowable Business Investment Loss (ABIL) and Tax Credits
description: Complete Julian Rossi's 2024 Canadian personal income tax return using StudioTax 2024. His tax documents are located at C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\TaxDocuments\rossi\. Save the completed return as 'julian_rossi.24t' in C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\.

metadata.data_source: CRA Guide T4037 (Capital Gains) 2024; CRA IT-484R2 (Business Investment Losses)
metadata.key_complexity: Allowable Business Investment Loss (ABIL) vs regular capital loss; Digital News Subscription Tax Credit cap ($500); Student loan interest vs carrying charges
